ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match took place */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first competing team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second competing team */,
  "full_time_score" TEXT /* Score at the end of full time */,
  "half_time_score" TEXT /* Score at half time */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "team_formation" TEXT /* Team's preferred formation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium FOREIGN KEY ("stadium") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "league_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the league (e.g., 1 for top division) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., grass, turf) */,
  "stadium_owner" TEXT /* Name of the stadium owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays in */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_value" TEXT /* Market value of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, substitution) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "assist_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who assisted the event (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the referee */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of refereeing experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_referees" (
  "match_referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-referee pairing */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "assistant_referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assistant referee (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the season championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_seasons" (
  "match_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-season pairing */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the match occurs */,
  "matchday" INTEGER /* Matchday number within the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_seasons_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, journalist, analyst) */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the match data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player (if applicable) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team (if applicable) */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., goals, assists, yellow cards) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the statistic was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the injured player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, broken bone) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of the player's return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
